spec_match.rationale: The DOM tree traversal model correctly implements parent-child inheritance constraints as outlined in the spec.

interactive.rationale: Exceptional interactivity. Provides multiple cyclic buttons to toggle attributes at five DOM levels simultaneously, updating a tree diagram and dynamic IDL properties.

blurb_alignment.rationale: Highly aligned, presenting a pristine workspace to experiment with DOM attribute inheritance.

edge_cases.rationale: Directly facilitates testing element override edge cases (e.g., parent off, child on).

references.rationale: Missing the mandatory reference link to the chromestatus.com/feature/6264645053710336 entry.

design_system.rationale: Beautifully structured tree visualization with clean borders, code labels, and high-contrast state badges.

openQuestions.title: Add missing chromestatus.com reference link
openQuestions.detail: Every concept page must include a link to the associated ChromeStatus entry. Add a link to https://chromestatus.com/feature/6264645053710336 in the references list or crumbs block.

summary: The inheritance-tester is a world-class educational tool that maps parent-child attribute overrides in real-time, but it is missing the required ChromeStatus link.
